title: Think Like an Entrepreneur, Act Like a CEO
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two interlocking / adjacent figures: a small loop on the left (entrepreneur) + a sharp square on the right (CEO). The ENT mark and the CEO mark are rendered as glyphs. A single red rule bisects them. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1900)" fill="none">
    <!-- Entrepreneur glyph: organic loop -->
    <path d="M-380 0 C -380 -180, -180 -260, -80 -160 C 20 -60, -200 40, -100 160 C 0 280, 200 80, 100 -40" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="-280" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#4c4c4c">ENTREPRENEUR</text>

    <!-- CEO glyph: strict square with internal grid -->
    <rect x="180" y="-160" width="320" height="320" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="180" y1="-50" x2="500" y2="-50" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="180" y1="60" x2="500" y2="60" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="280" y1="-160" x2="280" y2="160" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="400" y1="-160" x2="400" y2="160" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="340" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#4c4c4c">CEO</text>

    <!-- The connecting red slash between the two glyphs: the book's thesis -->
    <line x1="-30" y1="-160" x2="120" y2="160" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two glyphs sit at the bottom: an organic looping path (Entrepreneur) and a strict square with internal grid (CEO). A single red slash cuts diagonally between them — the book says you must be BOTH. 320px mixed-case title dominates the top 2/3 in weight 300. The slash is the only red, the conceptual bridge.
